Technical Requirement

04
CMS / Content Management Software
Where content lives and which CMS to use
A CMS lets you remotely push content updates, schedule playlists, and monitor displays. If unsure, pick No — you can always add CMS later.
For ≤25 player deployments on On-premise, CMS is optional. >25 players or Cloud deployments require CMS.
Recommended: BrightSign CMS (native ecosystem)
How long the CMS license is paid up-front for.
Billing structure: Vendor and term captured — line items appear in BOM

Manage your contact details and password.
📊 Reports Super only
Send a quarterly or annual review email to the team. Auto-cron also fires on the 1st of each quarter (00:30 IST) + April 1 (FY rollover) — these buttons are for ad-hoc sends.
Directory
Directory
Master list of people you work with. Keep entries consistent so pipeline analytics stay clean. Super admin can merge duplicates.

Merge Customers

The SOURCE customer will be merged INTO the target. The source name will be added as an alias on the target, all deal entries for the source customer will be reassigned to the target, and the source customer will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
